name: ClawChat
description: First-party mobile messaging for OpenClaw. Connects to the ClawChat relay so iOS/Android apps can chat with your agent.

relay.label: Relay URL
relay.help: WebSocket URL of the ClawChat relay service.

token.label: Gateway Token
token.help: Token used to register this gateway with the relay. Keep secret.

session.label: Session Key
session.help: OpenClaw session key for incoming messages (default: clawchat).
